items.title: F-1 ‚Äî AxiomFolio Render services repoint to monorepo
items.why: `axiomfolio-api`, workers, and static frontend still deploy from `paperwork-labs/axiomfolio`; `apis/axiomfolio/` changes on `main` do not ship to production.
items.where: [Render Blueprints + dashboard](https://dashboard.render.com) ‚Äî Path B in runbook.
steps: 1. Confirm `main` is green: `gh run list --branch main --limit 3`.
2. Follow **Path B** in `docs/infra/RENDER_REPOINT.md` (New Blueprint ‚Üí `paperwork-labs/paperwork` ‚Üí associate existing `axiomfolio-*` services).
3. Wait for deploys; run health checks from the runbook **Verification** section.
4. Tick F-1 in `docs/infra/RENDER_INVENTORY.md` when all `repo` fields show the monorepo.
5. After 24h green, archive the old repo per runbook (optional but recommended).
items.verification: `curl` health URLs in `RENDER_REPOINT.md`; Studio ‚Üí **Admin ‚Üí Infrastructure** shows services healthy; Render UI shows `paperwork-labs/paperwork` for all four services.
items.source: [RENDER_REPOINT Path B](docs/infra/RENDER_REPOINT.md), [RENDER_INVENTORY F-1](docs/infra/RENDER_INVENTORY.md); PRs touching medallion / port batch

items.title: `design.paperworklabs.com` ‚Äî Vercel project + domain + auto-promote matrix
items.why: The design Storybook canvas does not have a first-class production host until the Vercel project exists, the GitHub promote workflow has a real project id, and DNS points at Vercel.
items.where: [Vercel ‚Äî Paperwork Labs team](https://vercel.com/paperwork-labs), Cloudflare DNS for `paperworklabs.com` zone, `.github/workflows/vercel-promote-on-merge.yaml`.
steps: 1. Vercel ‚Üí New Project ‚Üí import `paperwork-labs/paperwork`, root `apps/design`, production branch `main` (add `vercel.json` in the app root after the project is created, if not generated automatically).

2. Copy Project ID (`prj_‚Ä¶`) and replace the `TBD_CREATE_BEFORE_MERGE` placeholder for the `design` row in `vercel-promote-on-merge.yaml` and the tracked table in `docs/infra/VERCEL_AUTO_PROMOTE.md`.
3. Vercel project ‚Üí Domains ‚Üí add `design.paperworklabs.com`.
4. In Cloudflare, add the CNAME Vercel shows; **disable proxy** (DNS only) for clean TLS issuance.
items.verification: `https://design.paperworklabs.com` serves Storybook static build; merge to `main` updates production (or PR comment on promote workflow shows success).

items.title: GitHub `CHROMATIC_PROJECT_TOKEN` + Chromatic project wiring
items.why: Visual regression CI for `apps/design` / shared packages is a no-op until the token exists and `chromatic.config.json` has a real `projectId`.
steps: 1. Create Chromatic project for this repo‚Äôs Storybook; copy project token and id.
2. Add repo secret `CHROMATIC_PROJECT_TOKEN`.
3. Set `projectId` in `apps/design/chromatic.config.json` to match Chromatic.
4. Push a change under `apps/design/**` or `packages/**/src/**` (or run Chromatic locally) to baseline.
items.verification: Chromatic check passes on a PR; dashboard shows a build/baseline.
items.source: PR #255 (in-repo Chromatic VRT runbook under `docs/infra/` when that runbook ships; path not fixed yet)

items.title: `GITHUB_WEBHOOK_SECRET` on `brain-api` (Render) + GitHub repo webhook
items.why: Brain‚Äôs `POST` webhook handler HMAC-verifies with `GITHUB_WEBHOOK_SECRET`. An unset or mismatched value breaks Dependabot/PR automation from GitHub. The repo must deliver webhooks to Brain‚Äôs URL with the same secret.
items.where: [Render `brain-api` environment](https://dashboard.render.com), [GitHub repo ‚Üí Settings ‚Üí Webhooks](https://github.com/paperwork-labs/paperwork/settings/hooks) (or org-level; follow internal convention).
steps: 1. **Generate** a strong shared secret; store in 1Password / vault.

2. Set `GITHUB_WEBHOOK_SECRET` on Render `brain-api` (declared in `render.yaml` with `sync: false` ‚Äî value must be pasted in dashboard). **`[VERIFY]`** whether production already has a value; compare with GitHub hook configuration.

3. Ensure GitHub sends `pull_request` (and other required events per `docs/DEPENDABOT.md`) to `https://brain.paperworklabs.com/api/v1/webhooks/github` (path prefix may differ ‚Äî confirm in `apis/brain/app/routers/webhooks.py`).
4. Redeliver a test event from GitHub and confirm Brain logs 2xx.
items.verification: GitHub ‚ÄúRecent Deliveries‚Äù green; `POST` does not 401/403; Brain automation processes a test Dependabot or PR event.

items.title: Render `brain-api`: use `VERCEL_API_TOKEN` only (drop legacy `VERCEL_TOKEN` row if present)
items.why: Brain and automation read only `VERCEL_API_TOKEN`. A second env row under the old name invites confusion and rotation mistakes.
steps: 1. Confirm only `VERCEL_API_TOKEN` is required in code and workflows (`VERCEL_AUTO_PROMOTE.md`).
2. **`[VERIFY]`** If the dashboard still has `VERCEL_TOKEN`, rename that row to `VERCEL_API_TOKEN` (same value) or remove the duplicate after confirming nothing else references the old name.
items.verification: Brain infra tools / Studio infra probes still work; no env errors in logs.

items.title: n8n shadow workflows ‚Äî disable originals after Brain cutover
items.why: Retired n8n JSONs were moved to `infra/hetzner/workflows/retired/`; if the live n8n instance still runs them, you get duplicate Slack posts and duplicate triggers versus Brain.
steps: 1. For each row in `infra/hetzner/workflows/retired/RETIRED.md`, confirm the corresponding workflow is **inactive** in n8n.
2. For `brain-pr-summary`, consider removing a GitHub ‚Üí n8n webhook if it only supported that flow (see PR #216 body).
items.verification: No duplicate posts in target Slack channels; n8n execution history clean for those flows.

items.title: Render (`brain-api`) env hygiene after n8n ‚Üí Brain cron cutover
items.why: Ex-n8n crons run on Brain when `BRAIN_SCHEDULER_ENABLED=true`. Remove stale `BRAIN_OWNS_DAILY_BRIEFING`-style env vars from Render so operators are not misled (they are ignored by code).
items.where: Render `brain-api` environment variables; full matrix in `docs/infra/BRAIN_SCHEDULER.md`.
steps: 1. Ex-n8n crons and J1 ambient-learning schedulers (sprint auto-logger, merged-PR / decision / postmortem ingesters) are **always on** when `BRAIN_SCHEDULER_ENABLED=true`. Optional gates remain for sprint planner / agent sprint scheduler / PR triage ‚Äî see [BRAIN_SCHEDULER.md](BRAIN_SCHEDULER.md).
2. Watch `#engineering` / `#engineering-cron-shadow` and Brain logs; confirm no duplicate user-facing posts.
3. Remove obsolete `BRAIN_OWNS_DAILY_BRIEFING` (and siblings) from Render env if still present ‚Äî they are ignored.
4. Remove obsolete `BRAIN_OWNS_SPRINT_AUTO_LOGGER` and any `BRAIN_OWNS_*INGEST*` / `BRAIN_OWNS_*INGESTER` keys if still present ‚Äî they are ignored (WS-18 / J1 retirement).
items.verification: `GET /internal/schedulers` or `SELECT id FROM apscheduler_jobs`; optional `GET /api/v1/admin/scheduler/n8n-mirror/status` returns `retired: true`.
items.eta: ~60+ min (spread across days; not one sitting)

items.title: Vercel auto-promote matrix placeholders + stale production recovery ‚Äî `[VERIFY]`
items.why: `.github/workflows/vercel-promote-on-merge.yaml` includes rows with `project_id: TBD_CREATE_BEFORE_MERGE` (`design`, `accounts`). Those jobs intentionally skip until real `prj_‚Ä¶` ids exist. Separately, if **no** READY deployment exists for the merge commit on a real project, **promote cannot fix production** (alias-only); CI must fail loudly ‚Äî see `docs/infra/VERCEL_AUTO_PROMOTE.md`.
items.where: [Vercel ‚Äî Paperwork Labs](https://vercel.com/paperwork-labs); workflow matrix; optional `gh secret list` for `VERCEL_API_TOKEN`.
steps: 1. For each placeholder row: create or locate the Vercel project, copy **Project ID** from Settings ‚Üí General, replace `TBD_CREATE_BEFORE_MERGE` in the workflow (do not invent ids).

2. If production is stale and `vercel deploy` / redeploy returns **402** `api-deployments-free-per-day`, the team hit the **Hobby daily deployment cap** ‚Äî wait for reset, upgrade, or use the dashboard to **promote** an existing READY deployment that already matches `main` (no new build).
3. If CLI reports a doubled root path (e.g. `apps/studio/apps/studio`), fix **Root Directory** under the Vercel project‚Äôs General settings (often one `apps/<name>` segment, not nested twice).
items.verification: Merge a PR that touches shared paths; promote workflow comments or promotes; `vercel api`/dashboard shows production `githubCommitSha` matching `git rev-parse origin/main` for studio, launchfree, filefree, distill.
items.eta: ~15‚Äì30 min per project + any plan/cap wait

items.title: Clerk ‚ÄúPowered by Clerk‚Äù / Pro branding on dev ‚Äî `[VERIFY]`
items.why: On Hobby, some Clerk surfaces show vendor branding; product Standard is to minimize Clerk chrome for customer-facing UIs. PR #234 shipped shared `@paperwork-labs/auth-clerk` appearance defaults; long-term, Clerk Pro or Dashboard settings may be required for full control.
items.where: [Clerk Dashboard](https://dashboard.clerk.com) for each app instance; per-app Vercel env for appearance-related overrides if any.
items.verification: Sign-in on each public app: branding matches brand guidelines; no unexpected Clerk footer.
items.eta: ~30 min (research) + any Clerk plan upgrade (business decision)

items.title: DNS + Dashboard for Clerk production (`paperworklabs.com` / `accounts.paperworklabs.com`) ‚Äî `[VERIFY]`
items.why: Clerk production for **`paperworklabs.com`** needs the **five CNAMEs** (Frontend API, Account portal, mail, DKIM) verified in the Dashboard before hosted auth flows are fully trusted. Satellite domains (other brands) still follow `CLERK_SATELLITE_TOPOLOGY.md` when you enable them. Embedded-only auth in individual apps (PR #210) **reduced** reliance on `accounts.*` for basic login in some surfaces; **Track H4** for the root zone is **DNS + verification** ‚Äî see **[`CLERK_DNS_SPACESHIP.md`](docs/infra/CLERK_DNS_SPACESHIP.md)** (Clerk auto-hosts the Account Portal at `accounts.paperworklabs.com`; no custom `apps/accounts/` deploy required for that portal). ~~Former Track H4 (`apps/accounts` micro-app)~~ ‚Äî **superseded** by Clerk-hosted Account Portal per [`docs/KNOWLEDGE.md`](../KNOWLEDGE.md) ¬ßD91.
items.where: **Spaceship** DNS for `paperworklabs.com` (not Cloudflare/Vercel DNS for this zone); [Clerk Dashboard](https://dashboard.clerk.com) ‚Üí **Configure** ‚Üí **Developers** ‚Üí **Domains**.
items.verification: `dig` one-liner in `CLERK_DNS_SPACESHIP.md`; all five **Verified** in Dashboard; optional end-to-end sign-in across a pilot satellite when satellites are enabled.
items.eta: ~15 min (DNS paste) + propagation; satellite program add 1‚Äì2 h when executed

2026-04-25: F-4 ‚Äî Single `render.yaml` at repo root. Source: `docs/infra/RENDER_INVENTORY.md` F-4.

2026-04-27: Track I2 ‚Äî Brain reads only `VERCEL_API_TOKEN` (pydantic `VERCEL_TOKEN` alias removed). Founder: align Render env key name with blueprint (`VERCEL_API_TOKEN`). Source: F-3 in `docs/infra/RENDER_INVENTORY.md`.
